labels.name: story
labels.value: Full Amazon.eg flow per task: login → menu → filters → sort → add under 15k → cart check → checkout → total check

name: fullAmazonShoppingFlow
description:
1. Open https://www.amazon.eg/ and login
2. Open 'All' menu from the left side
3. Click 'Video Games' then 'All Video Games'
4. Left filter: Free Shipping + condition New
5. Right sort: Price High to Low
6. Add all products below 15k EGP; if none on page, go to next page
7. Verify ALL added products are in cart
8. Add address and choose Cash on Delivery
9. Verify total = items + shipping (if any)

steps.name: Open All menu from the left
Click Video Games in side menu
Sort by Price: High to Low
Verify added products are in cart
